prompt: I run Claude Code in one terminal and Aider in another. Can I watch both sessions on my phone at the same time? And can I actually type from my phone to approve prompts in both, or is it just a read-only mirror?
assertions: Response explains running a separate itwillsync command per agent, both appearing on one phone dashboard
Response confirms the phone connection is fully bidirectional (can type and approve prompts, not just read-only)
Response uses correct `--` separator syntax for both agent commands
Response mentions the red-pulse attention indicator for identifying which session needs input
